jsonLd.title: Khadim's is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Khadim's! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Khadim's:
Khadim's is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khadim's!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
